cleavage agent: Trypsin digestion was performed following the FASP protocol
collision energy: CID was performed with a collision energy of 35%
instrument: attached to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos™ Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: as the nanoESI source performing nanoelectrospray
labeling: the proteomic analysis revealed that, in some instances, NBW and LBW individuals respond to HFD in different ways
